name: fusion
description: Fusion — an ML/DS comprehension IDE. A shared core (Python tensor-shape tracer + Svelte cockpit + typed protocol) drives two hosts: a VS Code extension and a standalone Electron desktop app.

scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @fusion/shared && npm run build -w @fusion/core
scripts.build:vscode: npm run build:core && npm run compile -w fusion-cockpit
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:core && npm run build -w @fusion/desktop
scripts.start:desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run app -w @fusion/desktop
